violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. All barware to be sanitized in 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Manager stated marks will be manually added to menu. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The prep unit gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
The exhaust fans in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
The kitchen floor tiles are in poor repair, observed with cracked and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
